catalogDescription: Validate an idea, audit the strategy, and turn the strongest next move into a build-ready founder spec.
title: Founder Spec Generator
subtitle: Validate the idea. Audit the strategy. Leave with a founder-ready spec.
descriptionBody:
Most startup ideas do not fail because the founder forgot to write a business plan. They fail because the first wedge is fuzzy, the assumptions are untested, or the founder builds before knowing what proof actually matters.

Founder Spec Generator talks through your idea, challenges the weak parts, checks founder fit, and turns the strongest path into a practical execution brief. It covers the jobs people usually split into an idea validator, SWOT audit, and business plan generator, but keeps them inside one guided founder conversation.
section1Title: One copilot for validation, audit, and planning
section1Body: Start with no idea, a messy idea, or a known business direction. The copilot asks for the missing context, separates evidence from inference, surfaces the sharpest risk, and packages the result into MVP scope, exclusions, pricing logic, GTM direction, and a 30-day action plan.

features.name: Idea validation
features.desc: Tests whether the direction is worth pursuing, what evidence is still missing, and what first proof would make it real.

features.name: Strategy audit
features.desc: Calls out weak assumptions, founder-fit gaps, wedge problems, and what not to build in v1.

features.name: Business-plan packaging
features.desc: Turns the decision into problem clarity, ICP, MVP scope, pricing hypothesis, GTM plan, and next steps.

features.name: Markdown export
features.desc: Copy or download the resulting founder brief as a clean .md file for Notion, docs, or team review.

whyTitle: Why use this instead of a blank document?

whyPoints.title: Avoid fake clarity
whyPoints.desc: A lot of founders feel productive while writing long notes that never become product decisions. This forces a sharper verdict.

whyPoints.title: Scope before building
whyPoints.desc: The most expensive mistake in v1 is building too much. The copilot keeps the first version smaller and more testable.

whyPoints.title: Useful for India and global angles
whyPoints.desc: The output can lean India-first, global-first, or mixed depending on the market you want to target.

footerSummaryDetails: (Free while we validate and tighten the output quality).
footerResultDetails: A founder-ready execution spec you can refine, share, and build from.
whoThisIsFor: Founders moving from idea to MVP.
Solo builders who need a first execution spec before coding.
Operators or cofounders aligning on what v1 should actually be.
Teams validating niche founder tools quickly.

faq.q: Is this a document template or a real tool?
faq.a: It is a live interactive tool. You provide the startup context, and it generates a structured founder execution spec.
Yes. Your draft stays on this device so you can refresh and keep going without starting over.

faq.q: Can I use this for India-first startups?
faq.a: Yes. You can choose India, Global, or India + Global so the spec reflects the market context you care about.
